user.title: De'Longhi My Coffee Lounge
user.description: Enter your My Coffee Lounge credentials and the LAN address of your Eletta Ultra (Daedalus).

data.pool: Account region (Gigya pool) — the integration auto-probes all regions, leave on EU unless you know otherwise

reauth_confirm.title: De'Longhi My Coffee Lounge — Reauthentication required
reauth_confirm.description: The stored session for {email} was rejected by Gigya. Enter your password again to renew it; the rest of the configuration (machine IP, serial number, region) stays as-is.

error.all_pools_unauthorized: Login failed on all account regions (EU, EU_US, CH). Your account may have been created via the in-app registration page (OAuth2/OIDC), which uses a different authentication path than direct login. Check that your password is correct, then open an issue on the integration's GitHub repository for further investigation.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the machine on the LAN
